content: Final taste signal from my lane: the integrated board still has one clear unresolved polish issue. The control/info cluster in `game.js:356-379` - deck count, turn controls, guide, and banner - still shares the same generic rounded panel/button language. Everything else has moved closer to game surface; this cluster is the last obvious dashboard leak I would hold against the Apple bar.

No safe rendering change to land from this worktree in the final round. It reopened on `run/apple/Frank-game-motion` with unrelated untracked `src/runtime-env.js`, so I left it untouched to avoid contaminating another branch.

The workspace is still pinned to another worker’s branch, now `run/apple/Frank-game-motion`, with an unrelated untracked `src/runtime-env.js`. I made no edits this round because there still is no safe Dave-owned branch state to work from without contaminating another worker’s code.

I re-checked `origin/run/apple/main`; the remote tip is still `ff14b099a4e727789e38f98c800257517969536e`, and there is no new branch movement or fresh acceptance blocker for me to gate in the final round. I’m standing by if a post-run follow-up snapshot needs re-validation.
